title: Rach Gia、Kien Giang — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Rach Gia、Kien Giang的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Rach Gia是Kien Giang的一个城市，人口约250,000。A Mekong Delta port city and gateway to Phu Quoc Island, offering an extremely low cost of living and an authentic glimpse into delta life.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
